headline: How The Story On Equitable Holdings (EQH) Is Shifting With Merger And Mixed Analyst Calls
summary: Equitable Holdings is under fresh review as analysts adjust their price targets, with several firms trimming their estimates by about US$1 to US$8 while others edge theirs higher. These changes reflect a split view, where some analysts point to earnings power and capital returns as support for current valuations, while others stress execution risk and less room for upside surprise across life and annuity stocks. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting calls and what they...

headline: Wall Street’s Verdict on Wells Fargo After the $110 Million Discrimination Settlement
summary: The smart money read on Wells Fargo (NYSE: WFC) following the $110 million lending and hiring discrimination settlement approved by a federal judge is clearly constructive. Sell-side analysts carry a buy-skewed consensus and a 12-month price target well above where shares trade today, while insiders have been net buyers into the settlement window. The Hard ... Wall Street’s Verdict on Wells Fargo After the $110 Million Discrimination Settlement
